Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
T-MSIS TAF Annual Provider RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.3 127 

PRVDR_TAX_NAME 

LABEL: Provider Tax (IRS) Name 

DESCRIPTION: The name that the provider entity uses on Internal Revenue Service (IRS) tax filings; most recent in the 
calendar year. 

SHORT NAME: PRVDR_TAX_NAME 

LONG NAME: PRVDR_TAX_NAME 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 150 

FILE(S): APR base 

SOURCE: T-MSIS annual provider TAF 

VALUES: Text string (e.g., UNIVERSAL
